title: Admin reaches the admin dashboard after login
description: This verifies that an admin can sign in and land on the admin dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
